reviews.review_title: 🐠 A Cozy and Creative Underwater Escape
reviews.review_description:
Aq﻿uarium – Painting & Coloring is a relaxing and cozy experience where creativity takes center stage. You catch a variety of underwater animals, paint them using realistic or completely imaginative colors, then release them back into the water. After a few creations, it’s genuinely satisfying to watch your personalized sea life swimming peacefully around you.

The game is easy to pick up, encourages experimentation, and feels welcoming for all ages. A calm, feel-good experience that’s perfect for unwinding, being creative, and enjoying a gentle underwater atmosphere.

This is a neat game, Don't get me wrong. But the reason why I'm leaving a 4-star review is because its very limited. It doesn't  have alot of options or features. Not trying to be greedy, But I probably think this game should have a paintbrush, eraser, or a paint bucket.  Just to improve the game a little bit.
